betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§f§6ME Storage Components §fare the core ingredient of item storage cells. Four tiers:

§b1k ME Storage Component §f(material:35) — 32 item types, 63 byte each
§b4k ME Storage Component §f(material:36) — 4× capacity of 1k
§b16k ME Storage Component §f(material:37) — 4× capacity of 4k
§b64k ME Storage Component §f(material:38) — 4× capacity of 16k

§fEach tier requires the previous tier in its recipe. Higher tiers need §6Pure Certus Quartz Crystals §fand §6Printed Calculation Circuits§f.

§aTip: §fCraft 1k components first and upgrade them. Do not skip tiers.
